title: A protocol for in vivo RNA labeling and visualization in tobacco pollen tubes
author: HAFIDH, SAID
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this method article, we describe adaptation of bacteria aptamer RNA labelling system for plant/pollen tube RNA labelling and visualization.
steps_raw: In this method article, we describe adaptation of bacteria aptamer RNA labelling system for plant/pollen tube RNA labelling and visualization.
